title: . Injunction prohibited. No temporary or permanent injunction or restraining order in any case
content:
. Injunction prohibited. No temporary or permanent injunction or restraining order in any case 
involving or growing out of labor disputes shall be issued by any court or other entity, except as otherwise 
provided in Articles 218 and 264 of this Code. (As amended by Batas Pambansa Bilang 227, June 1, 1982)
